A01_broken_access_control.notes: JWT auth on all endpoints, role-based access

A02_cryptographic_failures.notes: bcrypt password hashing, JWT with secret rotation

A03_injection.notes: SQLAlchemy ORM, no raw SQL, Pydantic validation

A05_security_misconfiguration.notes: CORS configured, CSRF middleware, debug mode check needed

A06_vulnerable_components.notes: No dependency audit run yet — run: uv pip audit, npm audit

A07_auth_failures.notes: OTP-based auth, rate limiting on auth endpoints

A09_logging_monitoring.notes: Structured logging added, request IDs present, no alerting

A10_ssrf.notes: External service URLs configured via env vars, not user input
